summary: Complete plan for deploying RustDesk server, building a custom EmaRemote Android APK (forked from RustDesk with custom branding), creating a landing page at rustdesk.emaandema.com, and setting up Nginx+SSL. Includes 4 phases: server deploy, custom APK build on Hetzner, landing page creation, and Nginx setup. All changes are isolated from the existing Ianua Vini app.
